title: Selling Courses Without Teachable or Gumroad: An Honest Side-by-Side Breakdown — A Practical Breakdown
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: If you're a creator in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, or Pakistan trying to sell courses using Teachable or Gumroad, you're likely stuck due to geographic restrictions and KYC requirements. Without a seamless payment solution, your digital products remain unsold, and your teaching skills go unutilized. You're not alone in this struggle, and there's a better way to sell your courses globally, without Teachable or Gumroad's limitations. Let's explore the honest side-by-side breakdown of selling courses without these platforms.
What Each Option Actually Offers

When you use Teachable or Gumroad, you're essentially renting a platform that handles payment processing, delivery, and customer support. However, these platforms have strict restrictions on certain countries and require Know Your Customer (KYC) verification, which can be time-consuming and limiting. On the other hand, Unchained Commerce offers a comprehensive solution, including the Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard, which empower you to sell courses without any platform restrictions, KYC requirements, or payment processing limitations. With Unchained Commerce, you have complete control over your sales, delivery, and customer support.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

Teachable and Gumroad have strict policies regarding countries they serve, and some countries are completely blocked. For example, Nigeria, Ghana, and Kenya are restricted on Gumroad, while Pakistan is restricted on Teachable. Unchained Commerce, however, operates on a decentralized model, allowing you to sell your courses to anyone, anywhere in the world. With no KYC requirements, you can focus on creating and selling your courses without worrying about platform restrictions or limited access to your customers.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When using Teachable or Gumroad, you're subject to their payment processing fees, which can range from 5% to 10% per transaction. Additionally, you may incur currency conversion fees, chargeback fees, or other hidden costs. Unchained Commerce offers a flat fee of $29.99 for the Admin Dashboard, which includes transaction logs, order management, and real-time analytics. With Unchained Commerce, you can enjoy faster payment processing, lower fees, and more transparent costs, ensuring you keep more of your hard-earned revenue.
Teachable and Gumroad restrict sales to certain countries due to KYC requirements and payment processing limitations.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Teachable and Gumroad offer varying levels of automation and delivery capabilities, but they often fall short in terms of customization and control. Unchained Commerce, on the other hand, provides a comprehensive automation and delivery system, allowing you to customize your sales flow, delivery options, and customer support. With the Admin Dashboard, you can manage your orders, track your payments, and analyze your sales data in real-time, giving you complete visibility and control over your business.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

If you're tired of Teachable or Gumroad's limitations and want to sell your courses globally without restrictions, Unchained Commerce is the better choice. With its comprehensive solution, including the Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard, you can create, sell, and deliver your courses with ease and confidence. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced creator, Unchained Commerce offers the flexibility, control, and support you need to succeed in the digital marketplace.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
Unchained Commerce offers a decentralized solution that empowers creators to sell courses globally without restrictions.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for a PayPal alternative for creators in restricted countries or a way to sell digital products without Stripe's limitations, Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard is the answer. With its transaction logs, order management, and real-time analytics, you can manage your sales and customers from anywhere in the world. Visit our shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to learn more.
Your Action Checklist

Start by accepting that no PayPal or Stripe workaround is durable — the platforms actively close gaps as they discover them. Create a NOWPayments account and configure wallet addresses for USDT on Tron and Bitcoin as your primary coins. Purchase and deploy the Core Shop Engine — it handles payment verification and automated delivery. Configure the Web3 Wallet Connect module with your product details and checkout settings. Upload your digital product files to your delivery server with the paths configured in the engine. Test the complete flow with a real mainnet transaction — send a small amount to your wallet and confirm the webhook fires and the delivery email arrives. Check the Admin Dashboard to confirm the transaction appears in the log. Add your store URL to your social profiles and content channels. You now have infrastructure that no payment platform can take from you.
With Unchained Commerce, you can keep more of your revenue and enjoy faster payment processing and lower fees.
Admin Dashboard — $29.99. Transaction logs, order management, and real-time analytics. See every order, every payment, every delivery — from anywhere in the world.
